Code fragment: public final TableField<PlanRecord, Boolean> WALD = createField(DSL.name("wald"), SQLDataType.BOOLEAN.defaultValue(DSL.field(DSL.raw("true"), SQLDataType.BOOLEAN)), this, "");
Explanation: The column 'wald' has a default value but is marked as NULLABLE, which means it can never be NULL in practice when using the default. Consider making the column NOT NULL since it has a meaningful default value.
